creator: danfe@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to gotnull from comment #2)
> Thank you for the fix Alexey
You're welcome!

> Do you think you could port the fix also to the "quarterly branch"?
I don't do quarterlies (nor I should be even allowed to, given it's a ports-secteam@ territory) but I'll try to find someone who might help.
